Compliance.description: PSIRA registered as major operator (inferred from operations/training); no 2025/2026 violations found; claims full regulatory compliance.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Limited SA-specific reviews found (HelloPeter page exists but sparse); global Securitas employee reviews mixed ~3/5; no strong negative consumer patterns in SA.

Product Value.description: Competitive industry pricing assumed; comprehensive services but lacks transparent quotes.

Innovation.description: Remote guarding, electronic security, SOC tech integration, mobile patrols with tech; global MySecuritas app (3.7/5 Android).

Customer Support.description: Contact form, phone (+27 86 110 0900), SOC 24/7; global feedback indicates delays but SA site emphasizes operations centers.

Accessibility & Security.description: Global brand with website and contact form; no specific POPIA mentions found but claims compliance with laws. MySecuritas app available for management.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Not publicly listed; industry armed response ~R400-1000/mo ZAR; SME fixed monthly fees

socialSentiment.summary: No recent SA-specific negative news; global mixed employee feedback; limited consumer visibility.
